word: H8080 - שָׁמַן - shâman - shaw-man' - Become fat

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמן

Transliteration: shâman

Phonetic: shaw-man'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be or become fat, grow fat
    1. (Qal) fat (substantive)
    2. (Hiphil) to make fat, show fatness

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2410

Part(s) of speech: Verb
